title: 3D Copper Rail
description: 3D model for The Copper Rail mod
body:
**This resource pack adds a 3D model for [The Copper Rail](https://modrinth.com/mod/thecopperrail) mod.**

**Copper rails fit perfectly with 3D rails from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs)!**
\
\
![Copper rails fit perfectly with 3D rails from Vanilla Tweaks ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6194a1d858e4045f7341e99988b36af54816254.jpeg)
